rule: ALLOW if B3 method_confirm==True AND observed_T>=tau ; else ABSTAIN_UNCERTIFIED (monotone: allow-set is a strict subset of B3 confirms; can only REMOVE, never add)
grid: deterministic: tau=0 + sorted unique observed_T among ALL B3 method-confirms
kind_specific_nulls: NULL_cov and NULL_cov_plus_label evaluated SEPARATELY (never pooled)
r1_eligibility: NULL_cov allow<=7/300 AND NULL_cov_plus_label allow<=7/300 AND NULL_label<=1 AND random<=1 AND POS_concept>0
exposed_development_only: tau read off the EXPOSED bank; viability signal only; R1 fresh-seed validation NOT authorized
